  - add LICENSE info
  - mark MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE
  - remove WITH_TABS option, now included in main package
  - take maintainership
  
  PR:             159793
  Submitted by:   initial version by me, improvements by maintainer
  Approved by:    maintainer (PR) miwi, wen (mentors implicit)
